Game Designer & Level Designer

Adriāns Pauls
Vilcāns

Rīga-based game designer with a bachelor's in game design. Specialized in level design, with shipped titles and hands-on experience across the full game dev pipeline.

adrianspvilcans@gmail.com itch.io/pekalv
Professional work
Wizario — Kolka Games
Level Designer
Oct 2024 – Jun 2026

An idle survival story game featuring monster combat, destructible objects, and player-built structures. Responsible for designing and building levels across a wide range of environments — from snowy towns and underground mines to lava fortresses, beach resorts, and fantasy worlds.

Designed levels spanning multiple distinct biomes and gameplay contexts
Balanced pacing, exploration, and combat space within each level
Built in Unity, iterating closely with the studio team

Personal projects
Game Launch
Action · Wave-based

A wave-based point-and-click idle game where you defend the main server against waves of attacking enemy bugs. Survive long enough to keep the launch alive.

A small indie game about stress management, made for Brackeys Game Jam 2024.2. Navigate the highs and lows of everyday stress in puzzle form.
